meta_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Mastering SaaS Pricing: Solving Debugging & Build Hurdles
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with debugging. Learn to implement SaaS pricing models effectively using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your dev career.
content.answer_block: Debugging barriers often stem from poorly architected pricing logic. By decoupling your subscription tiers from the core business logic, you gain clarity. Use Antigravity to scaffold your billing schema and Claude Code to perform iterative, test-driven debugging to ensure your pricing engine remains robust, scalable, and error-free.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a screen filled with red stack traces, the silence of your IDE deafening. You set out to build a SaaS, but you're trapped in a labyrinth of pricing logic that refuses to function. The dream of a launched product feels miles away, and the weight of 'can't debug code' is crushing your momentum.

But here is the truth: even seasoned architects face these walls. The bridge between a student project and a professional SaaS is mastering the intersection of business logic and clean code. By leveraging modern AI agents, you aren't just fixing bugs—you are learning to architect systems that are inherently easier to maintain and monetize.

steps.title: Define Your Pricing Schema
steps.description: Before writing code, formalize your tiered pricing logic. This prevents 'logic drift' during development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust database schema for a SaaS pricing model supporting Free, Pro, and Enterprise tiers. Include fields for usage limits and Stripe subscription IDs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a TypeScript interface for this pricing schema.'

steps.title: Decouple Logic from UI
steps.description: Separate your billing calculations from your frontend components to make debugging easier.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor my pricing calculation logic into a standalone utility function that is pure and testable.

steps.title: Implement Unit Testing
steps.description: Automate the verification of your pricing tiers to catch edge cases before they become production bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Jest test cases for my pricing logic, covering scenarios like trial expiration and plan upgrades.

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Webhooks
steps.description: Handle real-world transaction signals securely without polluting your main application flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure Express route to handle Stripe webhook events and update user subscription status in the database.

steps.title: Audit and Optimize
steps.description: Use AI to perform a final code review to identify potential bottlenecks or security risks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security and performance audit on my billing implementation. Identify areas for refactoring.

pro_tips: Always use the 'State Machine' pattern for subscription status to avoid impossible states like 'Active' but 'No Access'.
Never hardcode pricing values; fetch them from your database or environment variables to allow for easy updates.
Implement 'Dry Runs' by logging billing events to a local file before hitting the production Stripe API.
Use Claude Code to generate 'Negative Test Cases'—ask it specifically how to break your billing logic.
Maintain a separate 'Billing Service' file to ensure your core application code never knows how the money is handled.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing engine is live, focus on building a robust user dashboard that reflects these tiers, then deploy to a staging environment for end-to-end testing.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to build a professional-grade SaaS pricing engine. Stop letting bugs dictate your progress and start architecting your future. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
